_comment: SPI MCP metric catalog. The `metric_definitions` section is the canonical reference: CRMA SAQL + Snowflake SQL equivalent + ETL/DAG provenance.

metric_definitions.name: SPM Pipegen Forecast FY27 Q1
metric_definitions.description: Total SPM pipegen forecast amount for FY27 Q1 with YoY, aligned to CRMA SAQL logic for forecast tile.
saql: q = filter q by 'PROGRAM_TEAM' in ["Sales Program"];
q = filter q by PROGRAM_TYPE != "Pipe Progression";
Final = group CY by all full, PY by all;
Final = foreach Final generate coalesce(sum(CY.FORECAST_AMT),0) as FORECAST_AMT, coalesce(sum(CY.FORECAST_AMT),0)/coalesce(sum(PY.FORECAST_AMT),0)-1 as 'Y/Y';
metric_definitions.snowflake_sql: WITH q AS ( SELECT * FROM SSE_DM_GDSO_PRD.AIO.GSP_SPM_FORECAST WHERE PROGRAM_TEAM='Sales Program' AND PROGRAM_TYPE <> 'Pipe Progression' AND FORECAST_TYPE='Pipe' AND FISCAL_QUARTER='1' ), CY AS ( SELECT * FROM q WHERE REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_CMPGN_STRT_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}')='2027' ), PY AS ( SELECT * FROM q WHERE REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_CMPGN_STRT_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}')='2026' ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM CY),0) AS FORECAST_AMT, CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM PY),0)=0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM CY),0)/COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM PY),0)-1 END AS "Y/Y", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM PY),0) AS PY_FORECAST_AMT
validation_notes: Expected magnitude for FY27 Q1 is around 3.8B.
Use FORECAST source path, not GSP_SPM_PIPEGEN OPPTY_AMT_PLN_FX, for this tile.

metric_definitions.name: SPM Pipegen Cloud FY27 Q1
metric_definitions.description: CRMA-style SPM pipegen cloud amount + YoY for FY27 Q1.
saql: SPM_PG = filter SPM_PG by 'PRODUCT_MATCH' in ["Product Match"];
SPM_PG = filter SPM_PG by 'PROGRAM_TEAM' in ["Sales Program"];
SPM_PG = group SPM_PG by (GDSO_ID, SNAP_YEAR_STATUS, STG_2_FLG_DT_Year_Fiscal);
SPM_PG = foreach SPM_PG generate GDSO_ID, SNAP_YEAR_STATUS, STG_2_FLG_DT_Year_Fiscal, max(CLOUD_AMT) as CLOUD_AMT;
Final = group SPM_PG_CY by all full, SPM_PG_PY by all;
Final = foreach Final generate coalesce(sum(SPM_PG_CY.CLOUD_AMT),0) as CLOUD_AMT, coalesce(sum(SPM_PG_CY.CLOUD_AMT),0)/coalesce(sum(SPM_PG_PY.CLOUD_AMT),0) as 'Y/Y';
metric_definitions.snowflake_sql: WITH base AS ( SELECT GDSO_ID, SNAP_YEAR_STATUS, REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_FLIP_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}') AS STG_2_FLG_DT_YEAR_FISCAL, MAX(CLOUD_AMT) AS CLOUD_AMT FROM SSE_DM_GDSO_PRD.AIO.GSP_SPM_PIPEGEN WHERE PRODUCT_MATCH='Product Match' AND PROGRAM_TEAM='Sales Program' AND FISCAL_FLIP_QTR='FQ 1' GROUP BY GDSO_ID, SNAP_YEAR_STATUS, REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_FLIP_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}') ), CY AS ( SELECT * FROM base WHERE SNAP_YEAR_STATUS='CY' AND STG_2_FLG_DT_YEAR_FISCAL='2027' ), PY AS ( SELECT * FROM base WHERE SNAP_YEAR_STATUS='PY' AND STG_2_FLG_DT_YEAR_FISCAL='2026' ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM CY),0) AS CLOUD_AMT, CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM PY),0)=0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM CY),0)/COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM PY),0) END AS "Y/Y", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM PY),0) AS PY_CLOUD_AMT

metrics.name: SPM Pipegen Forecast FY27 Q1
metrics.description: Dashboard-aligned FY27 Q1 pipegen forecast amount + YoY.
metrics.sqlTemplate: WITH q AS ( SELECT * FROM SSE_DM_GDSO_PRD.AIO.GSP_SPM_FORECAST WHERE PROGRAM_TEAM='Sales Program' AND PROGRAM_TYPE <> 'Pipe Progression' AND FORECAST_TYPE='Pipe' AND FISCAL_QUARTER='1' ), CY AS ( SELECT * FROM q WHERE REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_CMPGN_STRT_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}')='2027' ), PY AS ( SELECT * FROM q WHERE REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_CMPGN_STRT_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}')='2026' ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM CY),0) AS FORECAST_AMT, CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM PY),0)=0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM CY),0)/COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM PY),0)-1 END AS "Y/Y", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(FORECAST_AMT) FROM PY),0) AS PY_FORECAST_AMT

metrics.name: SPM Pipegen Cloud FY27 Q1
metrics.description: CRMA-style FY27 Q1 cloud pipegen amount + YoY.
metrics.sqlTemplate: WITH base AS ( SELECT GDSO_ID, SNAP_YEAR_STATUS, REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_FLIP_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}') AS STG_2_FLG_DT_YEAR_FISCAL, MAX(CLOUD_AMT) AS CLOUD_AMT FROM SSE_DM_GDSO_PRD.AIO.GSP_SPM_PIPEGEN WHERE PRODUCT_MATCH='Product Match' AND PROGRAM_TEAM='Sales Program' AND FISCAL_FLIP_QTR='FQ 1' GROUP BY GDSO_ID, SNAP_YEAR_STATUS, REGEXP_SUBSTR(FISCAL_FLIP_YEAR, '[0-9]{4}') ), CY AS ( SELECT * FROM base WHERE SNAP_YEAR_STATUS='CY' AND STG_2_FLG_DT_YEAR_FISCAL='2027' ), PY AS ( SELECT * FROM base WHERE SNAP_YEAR_STATUS='PY' AND STG_2_FLG_DT_YEAR_FISCAL='2026' ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM CY),0) AS CLOUD_AMT, CASE WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM PY),0)=0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM CY),0)/COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM PY),0) END AS "Y/Y", COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CLOUD_AMT) FROM PY),0) AS PY_CLOUD_AMT
